auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ShipStation API key used as the API-Key header for V2 API requests. Generate and copy it from your ShipStation account API settings: https://docs.shipstation.com/authentication

actions.name: get_purchase_order
actions.description: Retrieve a ShipStation V2 purchase order by ID, including detailed product lines when returned.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving a ShipStation purchase order.

purchaseOrder.description: The raw object returned by ShipStation.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a ShipStation purchase order.

actions.name: list_inventory_levels
actions.description: List ShipStation V2 inventory stock levels and inventory-related properties for SKUs.

sku.description: Return inventory properties for this specific SKU.

groupBy.description: Group returned SKUs by warehouse or location.

limit.description: The maximum number of inventory records to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ShipStation inventory levels.

items.description: The raw object returned by ShipStation.

inventory.description: The inventory records returned by ShipStation.

raw.description: The raw object returned by ShipStation.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ShipStation inventory levels.

actions.name: list_inventory_warehouses
actions.description: List inventory warehouses configured in ShipStation V2.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ShipStation inventory warehouses.

items.description: The raw object returned by ShipStation.

inventoryWarehouses.description: The inventory warehouse records returned by ShipStation.

raw.description: The raw object returned by ShipStation.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ShipStation inventory warehouses.

actions.name: list_purchase_orders
actions.description: List ShipStation V2 purchase orders with optional filters and pagination.

orderNumber.description: Filter by the ShipStation purchase order number.

referenceNumber.description: Filter by the custom purchase order reference.

createDateStart.description: An ISO 8601/RFC3339 date-time string accepted by ShipStation.

cursor.description: The cursor value from a previous pagination link.

pageSize.description: The number of purchase orders to return per page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ShipStation purchase orders.

items.description: The raw object returned by ShipStation.

purchaseOrders.description: The purchase orders returned by ShipStation.

anyOf.description: The total number of matching purchase orders when returned.
The pagination links object returned by ShipStation.
The cursor extracted from links.next.href when another page is available.

raw.description: The raw object returned by ShipStation.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ShipStation purchase orders.
